productDisplayName: Puma Men Fox Black Sports Shoes
description: The Fox trail running shoe from puma is a great choice to wear when out running. Lightweight, breathable and generously stylish, this off-road shoe totally goes the distance over root, rock, and hill. Iconic style is the perfect complement to this capable racer.UpperSynthetic and mesh uppers for absolute durability and breathable comfortStrategically placed overlays for flexibility Central lace-ups for a snug and customised FitPadded collar and tongueBranding on the tongue, medial side and collarMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfortPadded foot-bed and fabric liningOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with multi-directional lugs for complete grip and tractionImpact guidance line for shock absorptionArchTec technology to guide the foot through a natural transition from touch-down to toe-offEverTrack rubber composite outsole supplies optimal durability in high-wear areasShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
